name: mirrortrace-archive-exposure
title: MirrorTrace AUX — Public-Archive Self-Exposure Audit (Wayback + STIX)
description: Auxiliary actor. Surfaces what the SELF subject published and LATER deleted but which still lives in a PUBLIC web archive: it queries the Internet Archive Wayback CDX index for snapshots of a URL/host the subject owns, optionally fetches each PUBLIC snapshot and runs the SHARED PII detector over its text, and emits typed module-events carrying the REAL archive capture time + content digest so shared/enrich/stix-evidence.js can wrap each as a STIX 2.1 Observed Data object (first_observed/last_observed = true capture time) for OpenCTI/MISP-interop takedown hand-off. Scope-gated to self/public_figure ONLY via shared/scope.js (fail-closed before any fetch). NO fake data: an empty archive yields zero events, never a fabricated snapshot.
